executive_summary: Build failure detected in scib_new repository on main branch. The build failed due to a GitHub Actions workflow dispatch error (HTTP 500 Internal Server Error). This indicates a configuration or permissions issue with the GitHub Actions workflow setup.

errors.description: Failed to dispatch workflow due to HTTP 500 Internal Server Error from GitHub API
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 500: Internal Server Error. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_new/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Failed to run workflow dispatch","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"500"}
errors.automated_fix:
1. Verify workflow file exists at .github/workflows/build.yml
2. Check workflow_dispatch trigger is properly configured
3. Verify repository permissions and GitHub Actions are enabled
4. Check for workflow syntax errors
5. Ensure branch protection rules allow workflow dispatch
6. Review GitHub Actions logs for additional context
errors.compliance_notes: This error prevents automated builds and CI/CD pipeline execution. Immediate remediation required to restore build automation.

recommendations: Verify .github/workflows/build.yml file exists and is properly formatted
Check repository settings to ensure GitHub Actions are enabled
Review workflow permissions and ensure workflow_dispatch trigger is configured
Check for any recent changes to workflow files that may have introduced syntax errors
Verify branch protection rules are not blocking workflow dispatch
Contact GitHub support if the 500 error persists as it may indicate a platform issue
